goal: Reconcile E1 verification evidence into session sources workflow

summary.title: Reconcile E1 verification evidence
summary.what: Merged E1 verification handoff and artifacts into the canonical workflow and marked E1 verified with R1 ready.
summary.why: The workflow needs durable evidence before final review, including the distinction between verified checkout behavior and unreleased installed/global behavior.
summary.user_goal: Reconcile E1 verification evidence into session sources workflow

decisions.chose: Commit the E1 handoff plus small smoke artifacts, including the fresh-db SQLite artifact.
decisions.rationale: The worker listed these as evidence outputs and their size is small enough to keep the proof reproducible.

decisions.chose: Record installed CLI/global skill/default-index findings as boundaries, not implementation failures.
decisions.rationale: The workflow explicitly forbids release/install/global updates and E1 showed checkout fresh-db behavior works.
All implementation, docs, and evidence waves are reconciled.

review_notes: E1 found default local index list --source codex fails on old schema with no such column: source_id, while status has read-only fallback and a fresh source-aware db works.
E1 found installed PATH cxs version 0.3.4 rejects --source, so installed CLI is not updated.
E1 found global cxs skill is symlinked to /Users/envvar/work/repos/cxs/skill-packages/cxs and lacks current source wording.
Verification before commit: git diff --check passed; npm run check passed with 27 files and 152 tests.

architectural_claims: Checkout source-aware behavior is verified on a fresh db; default local installed state remains separate.
R1 review starts with explicit release/install/default-index boundary evidence.
behavioral_changes: No runtime behavior changed in this reconciliation commit.
migration_notes: Default local index may remain old schema until an allowed sync/migration workflow runs.
